# Social Connectors

Social connectors are platform-specific integrations behind a common publishing contract.

Canonical source: [00-source-of-truth.md](00-source-of-truth.md).


## Platforms

YouTube, YouTube Shorts, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, and manual export mode.

## Connector Requirements

- OAuth or manually configured export state.
- Media upload support.
- Caption/title/description/hashtag metadata.
- Platform constraint validation.
- Rate-limit and retry handling.
- Analytics pull support where available.
- Secure token storage and refresh handling.
